name: Tyro of the Gauntlet
desc: Stand as One. When an ally within 5 feet of you is subjected to an effect that would push or pull it, you can take a Reaction to prevent that ally from being pushed or pulled. To receive this benefit, the ally can't have the Incapacitated condition.
Vigilant. When you take the Ready action, the next attack roll made against you has Disadvantage before the start of your next turn.
